t: [... in order to] establish his words which he spoke
[...] who swore to Abraham to give
[...] good and spacious, a land of streams of water,
[of springs and well-heads which gush in the p]lain and on the mountain, a land of wheat and grai[n,]
[... olive oil and] honey, for it is a land which flows with milk and honey
[... who]se [st]ones are iron and whose mountains are copper
[...] ... to inspect and [you] will take possession of [...]
